role: This file is the CSS presentation layer for the transcript-viz modal overlay, framing the DNA constellation graph and its search-driven corpus controls.
capabilities: Style a fixed sibling-overlay modal with scrim and panel
Manage open/closed visibility and opacity transition
Lay out a header with title, subtitle, and close button
Provide a search row with text input and pill button
Style a scrollable body centered graph mount
Render empty/error/quiet message variants and a retry affordance
Override DNA .ar-responsive grid to a single-column phone-frame layout
Size the embedded constellation SVG at 600px width capped to 100%
substance_why: It fully implements the modal frame, search row, message states, and detailed responsive overrides for the embedded DNA constellation graph.
interactions_missing: No open/close trigger or event wiring
No search form submission or query execution
No keyboard escape or focus trap
No scroll lock or reduced-motion support
performance_risks: Fixed overlay covering the viewport can cause large repaint areas
Opacity/visibility transitions on the overlay may promote layers
Color-mix scrim adds per-pixel blending cost
600px SVG width scales across viewports and may reflow
Deep selector overrides for .ar-responsive increase selector complexity
Flex centering with overflow:auto can cause layout thrashing on resize
Safe-area padding calculations depend on environment variables
reuse_why: The token-based layout and modal/search patterns are sound, but the token names and DNA-specific responsive overrides must be reconciled with the new design system.
decomposition_hints: Split overlay shell (scrim, panel, open state) into a generic modal primitive
Split search row into a reusable search-bar component
Split message/error/retry states into a reusable empty-state component
Extract DNA constellation overrides into a separate integration/adapter stylesheet
Isolate safe-area and motion tokens into global environment utilities
